# GENERATED FILE — DO NOT EDIT
# Source: src/app/**
# Command: npm run workflow:route-tree

/
├─ _layout.tsx
├─ (tabs)/
│  ├─ _layout.tsx
│  ├─ index.tsx                      route: /(tabs)
│  └─ settings/
│     └─ index.tsx                   route: /(tabs)/settings
└─ coupons/
   ├─ [id].tsx                       route: /coupons/[id]
   └─ index.tsx                      route: /coupons
